title: The Good, the Bad, the Weird
originalTitle: 좋은 놈, 나쁜 놈, 이상한 놈
posterAlt: The Good, the Bad, the Weird (2008) movie poster
tmdbOverview: The story of three Korean outlaws in 1930s Manchuria and their dealings with the Japanese army and Chinese and Russian bandits. The Good (a bounty hunter), the Bad (a hitman), and the Weird (a thief) battle the army and the bandits in a race to use a treasure map to uncover the riches of legend.
synopsis: Released in 2008, The Good, the Bad, the Weird is a action, adventure and comedy film from South Korea. It holds a solid 7.2 rating on IMDb. A standout of 2000s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
